name: npx_skills_add
description: Install skills from GitHub repositories using 'npx skills add <owner/repo>' command. This downloads and configures external skills.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to extract from the repo (optional)

handler: async (args) => { const { repo, skill_name } = args; const cp = await import('child_process'); const execSync = cp.execSync; try { const command = `npx skills add ${repo}`; console.log(`[npx-skills] Running: ${command}`); const output = execSync(command, { encoding: 'utf-8', maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024, timeout: 60000 }); return { success: true, repo, skill_name, output: output.trim(), message: `Successfully added skill from ${repo}` }; } catch (error) { return { success: false, repo, error: error.message, stderr: error.stderr ? error.stderr.toString() : '' }; } }
